economic_notes: KRW Limited Partnership established to develop Brandon Lands real property with Rolling River and Waywayseecappo First Nations. ARM Projects Limited Partnership shared with several Manitoba First Nations. Water treatment plant under construction with projected cost of $33,779,892 expected January 2026, funded by ISC. Migiziwazison Healing Lodge (Women's Shelter) under construction with projected cost $4,180,000. CMHC Rapid Housing project ongoing.
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 not 2024. Province is Manitoba (MB). Two partnerships accounted for on modified equity basis (KRW Limited Partnership and ARM Projects Limited Partnership) treated as GBEs. No schedule of remuneration provided. Net financial debt position of $8,347,868. Large CMHC Rapid Housing deferred revenue of $4,376,080. Forgivable loan of $1,719,500 from CMHC for Migiziwazison Healing Lodge. Construction advances balance reduced significantly. Prior year auditor was Lazer Grant LLP (since merged with MNP LLP). total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $14,208,575 + CMHC $4,969,669 + Parks Canada $364,859 + First Peoples Development Inc $298,191 + Province of Manitoba $525,269 = $20,366,563. OSR = $22,449,963 - $20,366,563 = $2,083,400.
